prompt: A split image of human lungs, one lung made of lush green forests and clean air, the other lung formed from dense polluted city buildings emitting thick black smoke, the pollution side spreading into the healthy lung like a disease, symbolic, emotional, dramatic lighting, highly detailed, cinematic, no text, no labels, no charts
insight: Air pollution spreads like a disease, gradually destroying healthy human life
concept: Air pollution visualized as a disease infecting human lungs
tradition_approach: Symbolic storytelling using contrast between healthy and polluted environments
